no_seed_reason: built-in image_gen did not expose a stable seed
prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: game sprite source sheet for runtime atlas
Primary request: two isolated voxel-style mining node sprites for a blocky idle RPG: one grey stone outcrop and one copper ore vein outcrop.
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for background removal; no floor plane, no cast shadow, no gradient.
Subject: exactly two separate assets, left asset is grey stone, right asset is copper ore embedded in grey-brown rock. Irregular chunky mine-rock silhouettes, not perfect cubes.
Style/medium: polished pixel-art / low-poly voxel game sprite, matching dark chunky mobile RPG UI, readable at 60x44 px.
Composition/framing: square source sheet, assets centered horizontally with generous spacing and transparent-ready padding; no overlap between the two assets.
Color palette: stone greys with cool highlights; copper warm orange-brown ore accents; subtle dark outline suitable for dark purple UI.
Materials/textures: broad blocky facets, clean silhouette, no noisy Minecraft-like tile texture.
Constraints: no text, no numbers, no logo, no watermark, no characters, no pickaxe, no UI frame. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the assets. Keep the chroma-key background one uniform color.
negative_prompt: text, numbers, logo, watermark, characters, pickaxe, UI frame, Minecraft texture copy, gradients or shadows in chroma background
source_family_role: stone and copper mining node source sheet
